title: Pink Diamonds!
description: Ever wanted pink diamonds? This pack is for you!
body:
**This resource pack adds a retexture to all diamond things in Minecraft.**

The features include: All tools, horse armor, blocks, and diamonds themselves have been retextured. The font has been recolored to be pink! (every font except for non-ascii).
And the title for the game has also been turned pink.


<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMER</summary>
This pack is not a copy of FIRESTAR09_10 (https://modrinth.com/user/FIRESTAR09_10)'s Pink Diamonds pack, I was not aware of the pack until I found it recently.

**His pack is probably better so go check that out!**
</details>



_Armor sprites and models coming soon!_

**Made in Blockbench**
